hooks.command: BRANCH=$(git -C "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" symbolic-ref --short HEAD 2>/dev/null); if [[ "$BRANCH" == "main" || "$BRANCH" == "master" ]]; then REPO_NAME=$(basename "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR"); echo "⚠️  You are in the MAIN worktree on the main branch. Do NOT do feature work here. Create a worktree first: git worktree add ../${REPO_NAME}-SMOODEV-XX-desc -b SMOODEV-XX-desc main"; fi
